header.title: "00 0963 Sentier des douaniers.jpg
header.description: Part of the coastal path (Sentier des Douaniers) on the rugged cape of the Côte de Granit Rose with large rocks of reddish granite. The Sentier Douniers (Customs Officers' Trail) is a long-distance hiking trail (G34) that stretches from Mont-Saint-Michel in the north to Saint-Nazaire in the south (Length about 1,800 kilometers). The photo shows the course at Perros-Guirec.
header.author: W. Bulach
